votes.reason: It preserves the essential player choice while making Drift materially poisonous across lineage and remembrance, though I’d keep the “random pre-combat debuffs” portion tightly bounded to avoid violating Menagerie’s mostly passive architecture.
The synthesis text for Proposition 2 is truncated here, so I can endorse the Standing Orders + Deep Tide principle in general but cannot vote confidently on the specific implementation.
